case_title: KENTON D RAIFORD VS. FELIX ESPOSITO ET AL

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAIFORD, KENTON D RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPOSITO, FELIX ESPOSITO, MARIA $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $205.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-15-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-23-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-15-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-15-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-15-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF KENTON D. RAIFORD (VIA COURTCALL) AND DEFENDANTS FELIX ESPOSITO & MARIA ESPISITO. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE AS TO DEFENDANT FELIX ESPOSITO, BUT NO PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARIA ESPOSITO, WHO WAIVES SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY RAIFORD, KENTON D AS TO DEFENDANT ESPOSITO, FELIX ESPOSITO, MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-23-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED MAY-16-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ESPOSITO, FELIX

REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAIFORD, KENTON D
